rationale: Reconfirmed at c92b3d26: config.go comments describing {model:"", family} resolve-to-family (lines ~140-147) and the validateReviewerEntries supersession note (~551-556) are byte-identical to round 1 and remain accurate against the code they document; the 'supersedes spec 112 R4' phrasing is present in both spots. The only change since round 1 is subtest (b) of TestLoad_EmptyStringModel tightening its assertion to require the distinctive 'sets neither "model" nor "family"' phrase (plus recovery: line) instead of a bare non-nil error, which more precisely pins the neither-set refusal branch and does not affect comment accuracy. go test ./internal/config/... passes.
findings: config.go comments unchanged from round 1: resolve-to-family behavior and 112 R4 supersession text remain accurate.
TestLoad_EmptyStringModel subtest (b) now asserts on the exact 'sets neither "model" nor "family"' + 'recovery:' substrings rather than just err != nil, tightening the pin without touching comments.
git status in bead worktree clean after review.
